_comment: ChirpStack Semtech UDP global_conf.json for Milesight UG63 Mini LoRaWAN Gateway. Authored by @intelligent-farming/lorawan-gateway-catalog (AGPL-3.0-or-later; see NOTICE). Point the packet forwarder at the ChirpStack Gateway Bridge UDP backend (default port 1700). Downlink additionally needs a tx_lut tuned to this concentrator — see the vendor documentation.
